creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The Identical name of Documentation :: Documentation was always annoying, left as is, to be the 'capture all' component for issues that couldn't explicitly be classified to the other Documentation components. 

Alternative naming perhaps ought to have been more obvious given the description "Handbook and FAQ " set at the time.

Looking back now, and in-discussion with Reporter via IRC, we'll rename:

Component: Documentation -> Books & Articles, leaving room for further detail in the description, to capture 'handbook' and 'faq' specifically as examples.
